---
title: "06. 主模态、兵势与脉象"
subtitle: "Dominant Modes, Strategic Force, and Pulse Patterns"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 6
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `goldenMeanAdjacency_has_goldenRatio_eigenvector` across 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本."
---

**主定理核 / Primary Lean Anchor:** `goldenMeanAdjacency_has_goldenRatio_eigenvector`  
**覆盖文本 / Works:** 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本

{{< include articles/synthesis_06_spectral_theory.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
